# getObjectAtPath

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the getObjectAtPath query

## Usage

```bash
csdk get-object-at-path --dbId <value> --storeId <value> --path <value> --refname <value>
```
